calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2017 Continued To Aug-29-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-14-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Erika McCartney's motion for approval of Proposition 65 settlement is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and Judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Laura A. Reding, CSR 711 =302/hk
